title: avena sempervirens subsp. notarisii
intro: Avena sempervirens subsp. notarisii is a subspecies of wild oat grass, scientifically known as a type of oat grass that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and soothe digestive issues. Avena sempervirens subsp. notarisii has been traditionally used to promote relaxation, alleviate anxiety, and support overall well-being. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be consumed as a dietary supplement or added to herbal infusions for its potential health benefits.
